ground_truth_fix: TL;DR. The issue is that you're making an out-of-bound access to the packet from the verifier's point of view. You need to check the packet is long enough to actually contain the IP header first. If you already know from the start you'll need to read both the Ethernet and IP headers, you can update your check from:

candidate_repairs.patch_hint: Add bounds check: if (data + offset + size <= data_end)
candidate_repairs.rationale: The required packet access proof was never established.
